modules.name: Animated Wallpaper
modules.description: Play a GIF or video as your live desktop background, behind the icons, with per-monitor assignment and auto-pause for fullscreen apps.

modules.name: Monitor Arrangement
modules.description: Arrange monitors with pixel-perfect precision: drag, snap to grid/edges, type exact offsets, and apply without a reboot.

modules.name: Taskbar Manager
modules.description: Show or hide the Windows taskbar independently on each monitor, and let maximized windows reclaim the freed space.
